_meta.review_warning: AI-drafted v0. DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION until reviewed by a qualified Vic WHS practitioner and approved.

hazards.title: Mobile plant struck-by / crush
hazards.risk: Skid steer / mini excavator / tipper movements in residential yard

controls.title: 3m exclusion zone; spotter at all times in confined yards
Operator HRWL verified for plant size
Traffic plan: vehicle access, lay-down, pedestrian path

hazards.title: Strike of underground service
hazards.risk: Bulk works disturbing services across the yard

controls.title: BYDA + on-site scan; existing irrigation / pool / electrical paths mapped

hazards.title: Airborne dust — dry conditions
hazards.risk: Dust nuisance to neighbours; respiratory irritation to workers

controls.title: Dampen work areas during dry conditions

hazards.title: Slope instability during cut / fill
hazards.risk: Cut faces > 1m collapsing; fill slumping when overloaded

controls.title: Cut and fill angles per design / soil-type chart
No loads stockpiled above unbatter cut faces

hazards.title: Noise
hazards.risk: Plant noise; community impact + worker hearing

controls.title: Work hours respected: 7am–5pm weekdays; 8am–3pm Saturday; no Sundays / PHs
Class 5 ear muffs within 5m of operating plant

tasks: Pre-start: setout marked; cut/fill depths confirmed against design.
Pre-start: BYDA + services located; existing irrigation / pool / electrical paths flagged.
Exclusion bunting around plant operating area; spotter on duty.
Toolbox with operator + crew + tipper driver(s): signals, route, dump location.
Cut to design; respect cut-face angle; no undercut.
Place fill in lifts per spec; compact each lift.
Manage spoil to truck or stockpile; no stockpile above cut faces.
Dampen dust in dry conditions; suspend work if community impact unacceptable.
Final grade per design; check level.
Site clean; spoil removed; topsoil re-spread.
